name: express-pos
description: Restfull API pos using expressJS etc.

scripts.hooks:install: git config core.hooksPath .githooks && node scripts/env-hooks.js decrypt --soft --skip-worktree
scripts.docker:compose:staging: npm run env:decrypt:staging && docker compose --env-file .env.staging -f compose.yml up -d
scripts.docker:compose:production: npm run env:decrypt:production && docker compose --env-file .env.production -f compose.yml up -d
scripts.github:deploy:staging: gh workflow run "Deploy Backend to Staging" --ref staging -f mode=pm2
scripts.github:deploy:docker-staging: gh workflow run "Deploy Backend to Staging" --ref staging -f mode=compose
scripts.github:deploy:production: gh workflow run "Deploy Backend to Production" --ref master -f mode=pm2
scripts.github:deploy:docker-production: gh workflow run "Deploy Backend to Production" --ref master -f mode=compose

author: Tomi Mandala Putra
